name: Measles, Mumps, and Rubella (MMR) Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for measles, mumps, and rubella (MMR) vaccines including monovalent and combination formulations. Used in childhood immunization status (CIS) measure. Requires 1 dose of MMR by age 2 (first dose at 12-15 months) and 2 doses by age 13.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Measles, mumps, rubella, and varicella virus vaccine (MMRV, ProQuad)
